understanding.goal_understanding: Guide a selectable piece to reach a goal location (+) within the step budget, potentially using multiple controllable pieces and movable blocks to navigate around walls.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction (e.g., x changes by ±3 for left/right). If a pushable block is immediately adjacent in the movement direction, the move can push the block along with the piece; otherwise collisions with walls/objects can prevent movement (the movement_blocked hint only indicates adjacency and is not definitive). CLICK switches which selectable piece you control by specifying that piece’s exact pixel position from the state (same coordinate system as player.position).

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear boxed in by walls, so test whether the adjacent wall blocks movement or if there's a special interaction by attempting to move right.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in by walls, so test whether the adjacent wall blocks movement or if there's a special interaction by attempting to move right.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | All four directions are adjacent to walls, but the blocked flag is only a hint; test moving right to probe for any pass-through/shift behavior.
history.reasoning: All four directions are adjacent to walls, but the blocked flag is only a hint; test moving right to probe for any pass-through/shift behavior.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls on three sides; try moving into the adjacent selectable on the right to see if it can be pushed or triggers a swap/interaction.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on three sides; try moving into the adjacent selectable on the right to see if it can be pushed or triggers a swap/interaction.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | You appear fully enclosed by walls; since movement is blocked in all directions, switch control to the other selectable to continue exploration toward the goal.
history.reasoning: You appear fully enclosed by walls; since movement is blocked in all directions, switch control to the other selectable to continue exploration toward the goal.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving into the adjacent goal area; goals are non-collidable so this may allow passing despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving into the adjacent goal area; goals are non-collidable so this may allow passing despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_LEFT | We’re adjacent to the goal area; try moving left to see if we can enter/overlap the goal despite the wall adjacency hint.
history.reasoning: We’re adjacent to the goal area; try moving left to see if we can enter/overlap the goal despite the wall adjacency hint.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving into the adjacent goal/wall tile on the right; goal is non-collidable so this may allow entering or overlapping to finish.
history.reasoning: Try moving into the adjacent goal/wall tile on the right; goal is non-collidable so this may allow entering or overlapping to finish.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether the adjacent goal area is passable; moving right may allow entering the goal despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: Test whether the adjacent goal area is passable; moving right may allow entering the goal despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 9: MOVE_LEFT | We’re adjacent to the goal on the left; test moving left to see if stepping onto the goal triggers completion despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: We’re adjacent to the goal on the left; test moving left to see if stepping onto the goal triggers completion despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 10: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to test if it accepts the piece or triggers completion despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to test if it accepts the piece or triggers completion despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 11: MOVE_LEFT | We appear boxed in by walls on all sides; try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to see if it changes state or allows overlap.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in by walls on all sides; try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to see if it changes state or allows overlap.

history.summary: Turn 12: MOVE_UP | We appear boxed in by walls with a goal tile adjacent; try moving up into the goal area to test if it allows overlap or triggers completion.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in by walls with a goal tile adjacent; try moving up into the goal area to test if it allows overlap or triggers completion.
